meaning: adj.敌对的,交战的n.发动战争,战斗
examples: The troops will not attempt to disarm the warring militias.
The warring sides have agreed on an unconditional ceasefire.
The UN is trying to maintain a dead zone between the warring groups.
Better to pay them now than have warring heirs pay two sets of lawyers later.
Today, Kagame is president of Rwanda, and he insists on reconciliation between the warring groups.
